final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a domestic China fundraising roadshow, themed around the GPT-5.5 launch, with presenter Sam Altman.

Style/medium: needs a China domestic roadshow / GP pitch deck aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single PPT cover slide layout, landscape orientation, with clear title hierarchy and presenter credit
Subject: must include the following elements:
  - GPT-5.5 launch announcement as the central theme
  - Presenter name: 奥特曼 (Sam Altman)
  - Fundraising / roadshow context for domestic China GP audience
Scene/backdrop: needs a high-stakes investor presentation backdrop — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a confident, authoritative atmosphere fitting a major AI product launch and capital-raising event — exact mood execution is yours
Color palette: needs a direction aligned with GP / institutional investor pitch deck conventions — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-5.5" and "奥特曼"
Constraints: must preserve China domestic roadshow conventions (GP调性): formal layout, Chinese-market investor visual language, credibility-forward design
Avoid: overly casual or consumer-facing aesthetics; Western-only design conventions that would feel foreign to a domestic LP/GP audience
